description: stage configs + run NV-Generate-CTMR rflow-mr-brain GPU synthesis, summarize the NIfTI output
rules: thin wrapper: inference/sampling/decoding are delegated to upstream scripts.diff_model_infer; do not reimplement
uses the documented entrypoint scripts/run_mr_brain.py; never substitute a handwritten command
writes generated volumes + result JSON under record_store; the wrapper creates --output-dir (no rm/mkdir/cleanup)
MODEL_CONFIG 'default' selects upstream defaults plus the CLI modality and random seed
usage: Set MODEL_CONFIG (override JSON or 'default'), OUTPUT_DIR, MODALITY, and NV_GENERATE_ROOT (cloned upstream repo). Output: result.json plus generated NIfTI volumes under OUTPUT_DIR.
limitation: Thin wrapper over NVIDIA-Medtech/NV-Generate-CTMR scripts.diff_model_infer; do not modify upstream code. rflow-mr-brain is image-only (no paired segmentation masks). Output volumes are synthetic and not safe as production training data without independent review. Requires an NVIDIA GPU with >=16 GB VRAM; no CPU fallback. Not for clinical deployment, interpretation, autonomous diagnosis, or regulatory submission.
